name: property managers handling 5–15 commercial properties tool
description: For property managers handling 5–15 commercial properties, late utility bill payments cause cash flow gaps. We provide automated monitoring instead of manual tracking of utility bills.
problem_solved: Ensuring timely utility bill payments to avoid penalties.

locked_fields.primary_problem: Ensuring timely utility bill payments to avoid penalties.
